You are doing a launch-readiness polish pass on a real estate website. Make ALL of the following specific changes across multiple files. Do not skip any. After all edits, run `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npm run build` and confirm both pass. Working directory: /home/runner/workspace ## CHANGE LIST ### 1. client/src/pages/sell.tsx - Add `import { useSEO } from "@/hooks/use-seo";` to imports (it does not currently import useSEO) - Inside `export default function Sell()`, add this before the return statement: ``` useSEO({ title: "Submit a Property | Pegasus Dreamscapes", description: "Submit your property to Pegasus Dreamscapes for review. We evaluate as-is, inherited, distressed, and value-add properties in the East Bay and surrounding areas.", }); ``` ### 2. client/src/pages/submit-deal.tsx - Add `import { useSEO } from "@/hooks/use-seo";` to imports - Inside `export default function SubmitDeal()`, after the auth hook calls but before the `if (isLoading)` block, add: ``` useSEO({ title: "Submit a Deal | Pegasus Dreamscapes", description: "Wholesalers and deal sources: submit real estate opportunities to Pegasus Dreamscapes for review. We evaluate wholesale deals, capital structures, and acquisition opportunities.", }); ``` (The useSEO call must come BEFORE the early return for isLoading) ### 3. client/src/pages/contact.tsx - Add `import { useSEO } from "@/hooks/use-seo";` to imports if not present (check first) - Read the file - if there is no `useSEO()` call in `export default function Contact()`, add one: ``` useSEO({ title: "Contact | Pegasus Dreamscapes", description: "Open a conversation with Pegasus Dreamscapes. Submit a property, send a deal, request MarketFlow access, or discuss a partnership. Real messages get real responses.", }); ``` - Change `"info@pegasusdreamscapes.com"` → `"hello@pegasusdreamscapes.com"` in the contactInfo array AND in the href (both occurrences on adjacent lines, approximately line 124-125) ### 4. client/src/pages/terms.tsx - Find the line (approximately line 151) that says: `"These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Arizona"` - Change `State of Arizona` → `State of California` - Also check if there are any other Arizona references and change them to California ### 5. client/src/pages/about.tsx - Change the SEO description (line ~36) from: `"Learn about Pegasus Dreamscapes Corp, a Bay Area real estate investment company transforming distressed properties into profitable investments."` → `"Pegasus Dreamscapes is a real estate development, investment, and systems company. We exist to bring discipline, vision, and operational clarity to real estate execution in the East Bay and beyond."` - Change "Bay Area Based" (stat heading, ~line 132) → "East Bay Based" - Change "Deep Bay Area Knowledge" (stat subtext, ~line 145) → "Deep East Bay Roots" - Change the network description (~line 362): `"Connected with top real estate professionals across the Bay Area."` → `"Connected with top real estate professionals across the East Bay and beyond."` - Change (~line 363): `"East Bay and Bay Area aligned network"` → `"East Bay-rooted professional network"` ### 6. client/src/components/footer.tsx - Change `"Bay Area, California"` → `"East Bay, California"` in the location text (approximately line 90) ### 7. client/src/pages/partner.tsx - Find the block around line 429-433 that shows: ```
8-12%

Typical annual returns

``` - Replace `8-12%` → `Deal-by-deal` - Replace `Typical annual returns` → `Reviewed privately per deal` - Similarly find the equity block around line 446-447: ```
15-30%+

Potential returns

``` - Replace `15-30%+` → `Case-by-case` - Replace `Potential returns` → `Discussed per project` ### 8. client/src/pages/home.tsx - The home page hero section uses a full-bleed background image (`heroImage`) and has `className="relative min-h-screen flex items-center overflow-hidden"`. This is correct and needs no padding change. - BUT check whether the newsletter section (NewsletterSection) still works and is not broken. Read lines around the NewsletterSection function. - If there is still a function called `TestimonialsSection` or `TrustLogosSection` or any section that has fake testimonials/fake logos, remove the call from the return statement AND remove the entire function. But do NOT remove anything unless you actually see fake testimonial content (names + fake quotes) or fake logo placeholders. ### 9. client/src/pages/privacy.tsx - Read the contact section near the bottom. Fix any broken indentation on the closing `` tags if present (the audit flagged an indentation issue around lines 133-136 with 10 spaces instead of proper indent). ### 10. client/src/pages/terms.tsx - Same indentation fix as privacy.tsx near the end contact section. ## VALIDATION After making all changes: 1. Run: `npx tsc --noEmit` 2. Run: `npm run build` 3. Report any errors ## Rules - Read each file BEFORE editing to get accurate line numbers - Only make the specific changes listed — do not rewrite or refactor anything else - Preserve all existing code structure and formatting - If a change target doesn't exist (e.g., useSEO is already there), skip that part - Report exactly what you changed in each file
